name: Heady
description: Heady AI Orchestration System — Multi-agent swarm with Sacred Geometry routing, 3D vector memory (K3D), and HCFP auto-success pipeline.

skills.name: Brain — Multi-Provider AI Routing
skills.description: Routes prompts to optimal AI providers (Claude, GPT, Gemini, Groq) with vector-augmented context injection.
examples: Analyze this code for security issues

skills.name: Battle Arena — Multi-Node AI Competition
skills.description: Pits AI nodes against each other in arena mode for quality-maximized outputs.
examples: Run a battle on this prompt across all nodes

skills.name: 3D Vector Memory (K3D)
skills.description: Persistent 3D spatial knowledge store with HuggingFace embeddings and cosine similarity search.
examples: What do you know about deployment?

skills.name: Agent Orchestrator
skills.description: Dynamic agent spawning with deterministic routing and supervisor patterns.
examples: Spawn a research agent for this task

skills.name: Federated Liquid Conductor
skills.description: Multi-tier liquid node routing across local, cloud, and HuggingFace Space endpoints.
examples: Route this task to the best available node

skills.name: HCFP Auto-Success Pipeline
skills.description: Full execution pipeline with quality gates, Monte Carlo planning, self-critique, and pattern analysis.
examples: Run the full pipeline on this objective

skills.name: System Monitor Watchdog
skills.description: OS-level health monitoring with auto-remediation for runaway processes, memory pressure, disk usage.
